case_title: RUTH RITCHIE-SNOW VS. JRP ETIQUETTE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RITCHIE-SNOW, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT JRP ETIQUETTE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC JOHN ROBERT POWERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JOHN ROBERT POWERS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
